rubric_text: In `mailbox.json`, there must be no emails in the Sent folder
In `mailbox.json`, there must be exactly 2 emails in the Drafts folder

In `mailbox.json`, one draft email must be addressed to joem@pathfinder.com with mayj@pathfinder.com as BCC, and contain 'Bullion Gold Insurance', 'refund', claim IDs 'BGI-31199221', 'BGI-33991911', 'BGI-36110292', 'BGI-37918822', 'BGI-39667288', 'BGI-39882091', 'BGI-38399991' associated with $350, 'BGI-40001965' associated with $75, '$850', and '$1,275'

In `mailbox.json`, one draft email must be addressed to popler.wen@bulliongoldinsurance.com with mayj@pathfinder.com as BCC, contain 'overpayment'/'overpaid', 're-classed', 'unpaid claims', 'same patient', 'refund', 'subject to approval', 'updates', and claim ID/amount pairs: BGI-31199221/$350, BGI-33991911/$75, BGI-36110292/$75, BGI-37918822/$75, BGI-39667288/$350, BGI-39882091/$350
In `PBC_Claim_Register.xlsx`, cells I40, I41, I46, I47, I48, and I49 must each contain the value 'Unapplied'
In `PBC_Escalation_Log.xlsx`, cells row 3 through 8 must each contain 'Financial' as their Category, and 'Escalated to RCM Manager - 2026-04-09' as their Resolution_Tkg.
In `slack_data.json`, channel C001 must contain a message with text 'Escalation: 2026-04-09. Category: Financial. Payer: Bullion Gold Insurance.'
In `slack_data.json`, channels C003 and C004 must both contain a message that reads 'Refund case - AA45175 - B8475Q'
In `calendar_data.json`, there must be an event titled 'Escalation Attempt - Jill - RCM Manager' scheduled on April 9th, 2026 from 1:30 PM to 3:30 PM
In `PBC_Escalation_Log.xlsx`, there must be exactly 7 rows of data (excluding headers).
